name: Nextion Switch Component
description: The `nextion` switch platform supports the many switched components in the Nextion as well as integer variables. It can be a component or variable in the Nextion display. It is best to set the components vscope to global in the Nextion Editor. This way the component will be available if the page is shown or not.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The duration to update the sensor. If using a [Nextion Custom Switch Protocol](https://esphome.io/components/switch/nextion#nextion_custom_switch_protocol) this should not be used

config_entries.label: Component Name
config_entries.description:
**Required — set at least one of:** `page_id`, `component_id`, `component_name`, `variable_name`.

The name of the Nextion component.

config_entries.label: Variable Name
config_entries.description:
**Required — set at least one of:** `page_id`, `component_id`, `component_name`, `variable_name`.

The name of the Nextion variable. Any value over `0` is considered to be **on**

config_entries.label: Nextion ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the Nextion display.
